Raaw Energy dog food refuses recall despite ill pet and food positive for Listeria, Salmonella, Campylobacter and E. coli O157 Food Poison Journal Pet owners should be aware of this incident and take precautions. Affected animals: dogs. Substances or products mentioned: salmonella.

[Read the full report on Food Poison Journal →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
